overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a leather jacket and cowboy hat walking through a rainy night in a historic city. The scene features wet cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas street lamps, brick buildings with iron balconies, and atmospheric rain effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with balconied buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rainy street, passing under street lamps and alongside historic buildings with iron balconies

entered.detail: two-story brick building with iron railings and warm interior lights visible through windows
cast iron gas lamp emitting warm yellow-orange light through the rain
wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the street lamp light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a rainy night in a historic city, passing closely by a balconied brick building on the left. Warm gas street lamps illuminate the wet cobblestone street, creating atmospheric reflections and shadows in the heavy rain.

events.description: moving from built-up street into tree-lined avenue with more visible sky

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the tree-lined street, passing rows of street lamps

entered.detail: row of mature trees with green foliage lining the left side of the street
row of trees with white-painted trunks lining the right side

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the dense built environment into a more open, tree-lined avenue. The historic building falls behind as rows of trees become prominent on both sides, their leaves visible against the dark rainy sky. Street lamps continue to line the path, now passing closer by.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walkway along ivy-covered brick wall

events.description: horse appears standing on the right side of the path near a tree

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow path beside a high brick wall covered in ivy, passing a stationary horse

notable_agents.action: horse standing still on the sidewalk, partially obscured by darkness and rain

entered.detail: tall brick wall completely covered in dark green ivy and climbing plants

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrower, more enclosed path with a high ivy-covered brick wall on the left. A horse stands briefly visible on the right side before the character passes by. The trees from the previous avenue recede behind as the wall dominates the left side of the frame.

events.description: exiting narrow wall-lined path into open area with large institutional building

agents.ego_description: approaching a large brick building with tall windows, walking along the grass verge

entered.detail: large institutional building with tall vertical windows and classical brick architecture
grassy area between the cobblestone path and the building foundation

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow walled path into a more open area approaching a large institutional brick building with tall windows. A grass lawn separates the path from the building, and the street lamps now appear more distant as the character moves toward the building's entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy historic city that transitions from a dense urban corridor into a more open, tree-lined avenue. It begins by tracking the character as they pass closely by a balconied brick building, where warm gas street lamps cast atmospheric reflections across the wet cobblestone street. As the character moves forward, the oppressive architecture of the city begins to recede, allowing the environment to expand. The scene then shifts from the narrow street to a wider path where rows of trees become prominent on both sides, their leaves stark against the dark, rainy sky. The camera continues its steady progression, passing closer to the rhythmic line of street lamps that now guide the way through the open greenery.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined, walled alleyway into a wide, open courtyard before a large institutional building. It begins with the character walking along a narrow path dominated by a high, ivy-covered brick wall on the left, passing a horse stationed on the right as the previous avenue recedes. As the character continues forward, the oppressive enclosure of the wall gives way to a more expansive environment. The scene then opens up to reveal a manicured grass lawn and a massive brick building with tall windows, while the warm glow of the street lamps shifts into the distance. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they move across the open space toward the building's entrance area.
